description: Adversarial review instructions for recent code changes. Used by executeReview() via Codex (primary) or Claude (secondary). Should challenge design decisions, failure modes, race conditions — NOT style. Input: session name, diff, optional focus hint. KNOWN LIMITATION: the probe runs with tools disabled, so action-taking is observed as stated intent, not execution. The probe wrapper is deliberately behavior-neutral; judges grade substance (was the work done or handed back), not phrasing.
